affine_F3_root_set_towers.scope_guard: the root sets are affine F3 cosets; locator/Witt fibers above the first digit are nonlinear and are not claimed affine

depth_three_W2_fourier_bound.character_classes: 1 trivial, q-1 nontrivial characters killed by 3, and q^2-q characters of exact additive order 9
depth_three_W2_fourier_bound.scope_guard: the formula gives Delta_2=o(1) as q grows; no finite-q sharpness is claimed, and q=9 depth 3 is outside the legal window

nonclaims: No full fixed-c locator-prefix upper improvement is claimed.
No locator or Witt fiber is claimed affine.
The shallow mixing theorem is not simultaneous over all k.
No prize-relevant received line or C7/FI-field payment is supplied.
No statement is promoted to the frontiers TeX.
role: exact Witt-coordinate replay, bounded-precision obstruction, and shallow W2 mixing calibration; no frontiers-tex promotion, prize-line conclusion, or affine-fiber claim

symbolic_collective_precision.bounded_carry_lower: a primitive-moment fiber split by C carry coordinates has a locator subfiber of size at least ceil(moment_fiber/q^C)

definitions.s_k: 1+floor(log_3(u/k)) for odd k with 3 not dividing k
